decision: Hire a fractional COO instead of a full-time operations lead
reasoning: A fractional COO gives senior operating leverage at a fraction of the cost while we validate the org need.
data_available: Comp benchmarks for full-time vs fractional
assumptions: Operations needs are part-time for the next two quarters
risks: Fractional bandwidth may be insufficient during launch spikes
expected_outcome: Reclaim 10+ founder hours/week with maintained delivery quality.
